description: Etherpad is an open-source, self-hosted real-time collaborative text editor. It lets organizations run their own pad-editing service and extend it with plugins and tooling.
summary: Etherpad exposes a self-hosted HTTP API for pad administration plus local/operator CLIs; no public GraphQL or MCP endpoint was documented on etherpad.org.

surfaces.name: Etherpad CLI generated by Printing Press

packages.runtimeHint: prebuilt binaries/releases also linked from README
